behavior_summary: Provides in-game behavior for a set of consumable food items and an asynchronous psychedelic "mushroom" palette visual effect.
U8P_MOREFOOD::look returns a short player-facing name (bark) based on the item's frame/subtype (e.g., raw kith filet, kith filet, cheese, mushroom, tuber, bread, or generic food).

U8P_MOREFOOD::use handles consuming the item: plays a 'Mmmm...' bark, calls FeedAvatar with a code chosen by item frame (different feed amounts/effects), applies subtype-specific side effects (heal, damage, or receiveHit), destroys the item, and on a rare chance may spawn the mushroom palette-effect process.

U8P_MOREFOOD::func0080 implements the spawned mushroom palette effect: it marks a global guard (shroomPaletteEffectsActive=1), conditionally triggers immediate or variant palette fades (FadeToPalette) chosen by urandom, and on a rare random branch clears the guard and spawns a fade-to-clear (FadeToPalette(...,0x00)).
notable_control_flow: U8P_MOREFOOD::use: selects behavior by uword Item::getFrame(this); branches include feeding codes, simple healing (clamped to Str*2), applying a receiveHit, or a rare damaging/psychedelic branch for certain frames (0x04–0x0A).

The rare mushroom branch in U8P_MOREFOOD::use tests Item::getStatus bit 0x0080 and urandom(0x10) to gate either damaging the NPC (-2 HP) or spawning U8P_MOREFOOD::func0080 when shroomPaletteEffectsActive is false.

U8P_MOREFOOD::func0080 sets shroomPaletteEffectsActive=1, conditionally avoids immediate fade if fireStormActive or rainStormActive are true, otherwise spawns FadeToPalette(0x00,0x05), then repeatedly spawns variant fades chosen by urandom(3). A rare urandom(0x10)==0x07 branch spawns FadeToPalette(0x00,0x00) and clears shroomPaletteEffectsActive (ends effect).
open_questions: Exact semantic meanings for FeedAvatar numeric codes (what each code does to avatar stats/consumption) remain unspecified.
Meaning and gameplay purpose of Item::getStatus bit 0x0080 (what status this bit represents) is inferred but not certain.
Mapping from FadeToPalette second-parameter values (0x05/0x06/0x07/0x00) to concrete visual palettes/effects is not fully documented here.
Whether U8P_MOREFOOD::func0080 is always spawned as a separate process by spawn or sometimes called synchronously in other contexts (inferred spawn usage only).

main_function.name: U8P_MOREFOOD::func0080
main_function.purpose: Run an asynchronous mushroom/palette visual effect: set an active-guard flag, trigger palette fade variants (or a clear fade), and occasionally clear the guard to end the effect.
entry_conditions: Spawned (inferred) by U8P_MOREFOOD::use when a rare chance on certain consumable frames occurs and shroomPaletteEffectsActive is false.
Runs autonomously once spawned to manage repeating/variant fades until a random termination branch clears the effect.

function_map.name: U8P_MOREFOOD::func0080
function_map.role: asynchronous visual-effect process (mushroom palette fades) and guard setter/clearer

function_map.name: U8P_MOREFOOD::look
function_map.role: provide short descriptive bark for food item based on Item::getFrame(this)

function_map.name: U8P_MOREFOOD::use
function_map.role: handle eating/using the food: FeedAvatar, apply heal/damage/receiveHit side effects, destroy item, and optionally spawn the mushroom palette-effect

internal_calls.purpose: spawn the mushroom palette-effect process when a rare condition is met (and shroomPaletteEffectsActive is false)

external_calls.purpose: spawn palette fade processes to produce psychedelic visual variants or clear the effect
choose which palette variant to trigger and occasionally decide termination
apply feeding/nutrition effect to the avatar using different numeric codes per item frame
read the item's frame/index to select subtype-specific behavior and barks
test a status bit (0x0080) to gate special/chance side effects for some frames
read NPC HP to decide whether to apply damage (-2 HP) or trigger the palette effect spawn
set NPC HP after damage or clamp/heal branches (e.g., +2 clamped at Str*2)
read NPC Strength to compute HP cap used when healing (+2 clamped to Str*2)
apply hit/damage effect for specific throwable/weaponized food frames (uses Item::getDirFromItem for direction)
remove the item after it is consumed/used

reads.name: fireStormActive
reads.likely_effect: controls whether U8P_MOREFOOD::func0080 triggers an immediate fade; read-only guard to avoid starting certain palette fades during storms

reads.name: rainStormActive
reads.likely_effect: controls whether U8P_MOREFOOD::func0080 triggers an immediate fade; read-only guard to avoid starting certain palette fades during storms

reads.name: shroomPaletteEffectsActive
reads.likely_effect: used by U8P_MOREFOOD::use to avoid spawning duplicate mushroom effects when one is already active

writes.name: shroomPaletteEffectsActive
writes.likely_effect: set to 1 by U8P_MOREFOOD::func0080 to mark the mushroom effect active; set to 0 by a rare branch to indicate the effect ended (serves as a mutex/guard)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides in-game behavior for a set of consumable food items and an asynchronous psychedelic "mushroom" palette visual effect.
